article.title: BIS warns stablecoins risk fragmenting global financial system
article.summary: The Basel-based institution said that private digital tokens fall short of the requirements for sound money and urged policymakers to accelerate work on tokenized forms of central bank and commercial bank money.

headline: $1 Trillion Private Credit Fuels US Consumer Surge

article.title: Private Credit Quietly Backs the Craze Propping Up US Consumers
article.summary: Private credit companies are increasingly backing the "buy now, pay later" craze that's propping up US consumers. This trend is throwing up red flags for credit raters, former regulatory chiefs and others on guard for potential risks. René Ismail explains  (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: NZD Slumps on 3Q Growth Slowdown Fears

article.title: New Zealand Dollar Faces Tough Third Quarter on Growth Headwinds
article.summary: New Zealand’s dollar is facing a subdued third quarter as a resurgent greenback and the lingering effects of the Iran war’s energy shock drag on the domestic recovery.
